name: dynamic-island
title: Dynamic Island
author: Parable
description: An iOS-style black pill that spring-morphs between a compact idle pill, an expanded card, and a circular ring state, with layout-animated size and corner-radius. Works controlled or uncontrolled; collapsed it is a button (Enter/Space expand), expanded it is a dialog that Escape, its close control, or an outside click collapses, with focus handed to the panel on open and back on close. Under prefers-reduced-motion the morph is skipped and states switch instantly.
